spec.description: AWS Lambda cost estimation and performance monitoring per function.

spec.title: Est. Cost (time range)
spec.description:
Estimated cost for the selected time range.
Formula: (Invocations × $0.0000002) + ((Duration_ms/1000) × (Memory_GB) × $0.0000166667)

options.content:
## Cost Formula
**Cost** = Request Cost + Compute Cost

- **Request Cost**: Invocations × $0.0000002
- **Compute Cost**: GB-s × $0.0000166667
- **GB-seconds**: (Duration_ms ÷ 1000) × (Memory_MB ÷ 1024)

⚠️ Set **Memory (MB)** to match your function's configured memory.

💡 Free tier: 1M requests + 400K GB-s per month.

spec.title: AWS Lambda — Cost & Performance V5
